title: Digest configuration
description: Controls the cadence, scope, and recipients of the arXiv digest. Schedule timing comes from the GitHub Actions cron line; this file controls the digest's content and delivery.

cadence.description: Hint for which cron schedule to use. The actual schedule lives in .github/workflows/arxiv_digest.yml.

maxPapers.description: Cap on how many papers appear in one digest, after relevance ranking.

minRelevanceScore.description: Drop papers whose summed keyword weight falls below this floor.

includeSources.description: Source IDs (from search-sources.json) to include. Empty array = use all enabled sources.

frequency.description: Which digests this recipient gets. Defaults to 'daily'.

enabled.description: Defaults to true. Set false to silence one address without removing it.

recipients.description: Recipients of the digest. Each entry has at least an email; optional name, frequency, enabled. Production CI also honors the SCQ_EMAIL_TO env var as a fallback when no recipients are configured here.
